matrix.description:
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{cSDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{cSDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{d-DNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{d-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{DNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNF}}.

\citet[Theorem 1]{Bova_2014} gives a family of \langref{CNF} formulas whose smallest \langref{DNNF} representation has exponential size, so \langref{CNF} cannot compile to \langref{DNNF} in quasipolynomial size.

\compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{PI}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{FBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{PI}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{IP} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{IP}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{PI}}{\langref{MODS}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{MODS} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{PI}}{\langref{MODS}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{MODS}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{nFBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.
As defined by \citet{Darwiche_2002}, \langref{CNF} is a subset of \langref{NNF}. Therefore, a polynomial compilation is trivial.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{nOBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{PI}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langfam{OBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{PI}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}.
It is well-known that some \langref{CNF} formulas (i.e. the negation of the parity function $\neg PARITY_n=\neg\bigoplus_{i=1}^n x_i$) have exponentially many prime implicants. \citep{Darwiche_2002}

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{SDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{SDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langfam{SDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langfam{SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{uFBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{uOBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{PI}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{OBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{PI}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langfam{TDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{TDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{TDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{TDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{dec-DNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{dec-DNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{dec-DNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langref{dec-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langfam{cSDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langfam{nOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{CNF} compiled to \langfam{uOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langref{CNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{CNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langref{DNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{DNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{DNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langref{IP} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{IP}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langref{MODS} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{MODS}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{NNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langfam{OBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langref{PI} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{PI}}.
For each fixed vtree $T$, \langfam{cSDD}{T} is the compressed subset of \langfam{SDD}{T}, so compilation between \langref{cSDD} and \langref{SDD} is trivial. \citep{VanDenBroeck_2015}

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langfam{SDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langfam{SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.
\citet[Theorem 4]{Bova_2016_a} constructs a generalized hidden weighted bit function $F_n$ on $2n+1$ variables with \langref{cSDD} size $O(n^3)$ but \langref{OBDD} size $2^{\Omega(n)}$.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langfam{TDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langref{dec-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langfam{cSDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langfam{nOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{cSDD} compiled to \langfam{uOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{CNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{CNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{cSDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{cSDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{d-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{DNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNF}}.

As introduced in \citet{Darwiche_2001b}, \langref{d-DNNF} is a subset of \langref{DNNF} satisfying the determinism property, making a polynomial compilation trivial.
As introduced in \citet{Darwiche_2001b}, \langref{d-DNNF} is a subset of \langref{DNNF} satisfying the determinism property, making a polynomial compilation trivial.

\citet{Darwiche_2001a} provides an example of a d-DNNF sentence which only has exponential FBDD representations.
\citet{Darwiche_2001a} provides an example of a d-DNNF sentence which only has exponential FBDD representations.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{IP} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{IP}}.
The $OR_n$ function $\bigvee_{i=1}^nx_i$ can be represented in $O(n)$ as a \langref{d-DNNF} formula but has $2^n-1$ models. \citep{Darwiche_2002}
