\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{nFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.

matrix.description:
First, we show no polynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{nFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.

Now, we show a quasipolynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{nOBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langfam{OBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{PI} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{PI}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{SDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{SDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langfam{SDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langfam{SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{uFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{uOBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{OBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langfam{TDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{TDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{TDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{TDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{dec-DNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{dec-DNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langref{dec-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langfam{cSDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langfam{nOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{d-DNNF} compiled to \langfam{uOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{CNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{CNF}}.

ocompilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{cSDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{cSDD}}.
As defined by \citet{Pipatsrisawat_Darwiche_2010}, a \langref{d-SDNNF} is simply a structured \langref{d-DNNF}, so discarding the vtree completes the compilation.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{DNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{DNF}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{FBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{IP} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{IP}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{MODS} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{MODS}}.

noPolyDescription.description:
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{nFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.

matrix.description:
First, we show no polynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{nFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.

Now, we show a quasipolynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}.

noPolyDescription.description:
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{nOBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

matrix.description:
First, we show no polynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{nOBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

Now, we show a quasipolynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{OBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{PI} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{PI}}.

\citet[Theorem 1]{Vinall-Smeeth_2024} proves that there are functions with structured deterministic \langref{DNNF} representations of size $s$ but whose every equivalent \langref{SDD} has size $s^{\widetilde{\Omega}(\log s)}$.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{SDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}.
As defined by \citet{Pipatsrisawat_Darwiche_2010}, \langref{d-SDNNF} is exactly the subset of \langref{SDNNF} satisfying determinism, so compilation is trivial.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}.

noPolyDescription.description:
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{uFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

matrix.description:
First, we show no polynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{uFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

Now, we show a quasipolynomial compilation exists.
\compilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

noPolyDescription.description:
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{uOBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.

quasiDescription.description: \citet[Theorem 2]{Bollig_2018} shows that \langref{SDNNF} can be compiled into \langref{nOBDD} by adapting the compilation of \citet{Beame_2015} from \langref{DNNF} to \langref{nFBDD}; \citet[Proposition 2]{Bollig_2018} shows that this \langref{nOBDD} is unambiguous if the \langref{SDNNF} is deterministic.

matrix.description:
First, we show no polynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{uOBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.

Now, we show a quasipolynomial compilation exists.
\citet[Theorem 2]{Bollig_2018} shows that \langref{SDNNF} can be compiled into \langref{nOBDD} by adapting the compilation of \citet{Beame_2015} from \langref{DNNF} to \langref{nFBDD}; \citet[Proposition 2]{Bollig_2018} shows that this \langref{nOBDD} is unambiguous if the \langref{SDNNF} is deterministic.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{OBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{TDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}.

ocompilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{TDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{TDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{TDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{dec-DNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{dec-DNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langref{dec-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{cSDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{nOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{d-SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{uOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{CNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{CNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{cSDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{cSDD}}.
\compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}.

\langref{d-SDNNF} is the union of the fixed-vtree languages \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}. Hence any \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} formula is already a \langref{d-SDNNF} formula, so the compilation is trivial and polynomial-time. \citep{TCZ_Forthcoming}

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{DNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{DNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{DNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{FBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{IP} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{IP}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{MODS} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{MODS}}.

noPolyDescription.description:
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{nFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.

matrix.description:
First, we show no polynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{nFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.

Now, we show a quasipolynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{NNF}}.

noPolyDescription.description:
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{nOBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

matrix.description:
First, we show no polynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{nOBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

Now, we show a quasipolynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langfam{OBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{PI} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{PI}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{SDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{SDD}}.

\citet[Theorem 1 and proof of Theorem 2]{Vinall-Smeeth_2024} gives small source circuits that are explicitly structured: for the hard unambiguous \langref{DNF} $\psi'$, the proof fixes a vtree $T$ over $\operatorname{var}(\psi')$, compiles each term as a \langref{d-DNNF} respecting $T$, and takes their deterministic disjunction. Thus the source side can be stated as \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}. The lower bound is against every equivalent \langref{SDD}; since \langfam{SDD}{T} is a subclass of \langref{SDD}, it also rules out every target vtree class member.
\compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{SDNNF}}.
For any fixed vtree $T$, \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} is exactly the subset of \langfam{SDNNF}{T} satisfying determinism, so compilation is trivial. \citep{Amarilli_2018}

noPolyDescription.description:
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{uFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

matrix.description:
First, we show no polynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{uFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

Now, we show a quasipolynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

noPolyDescription.description:
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{uOBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.

matrix.description:
First, we show no polynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{uOBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.

Now, we show a quasipolynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{OBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{OBDD}}.

ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langfam{TDD}{T} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{TDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{TDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{TDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{dec-DNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{dec-DNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{dec-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilesquasi{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}.

ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langfam{cSDD}{T} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}.

noPolyDescription.description:
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langfam{nOBDD}{<} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.

matrix.description:
First, we show no polynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langfam{nOBDD}{<} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.

Now, we show a quasipolynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilesquasi{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.

noPolyDescription.description:
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langfam{uOBDD}{<} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.

quasiDescription.description: The common-order quasipolynomial simulation of \citet{TCZ_Forthcoming} specializes to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}: for every fixed source vtree $T$, it chooses one output order $<$ depending only on $T$; determinism guarantees that the output is a \langfam{uOBDD}{<}.

matrix.description:
First, we show no polynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langfam{uOBDD}{<} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.

Now, we show a quasipolynomial compilation exists.
The common-order quasipolynomial simulation of \citet{TCZ_Forthcoming} specializes to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}: for every fixed source vtree $T$, it chooses one output order $<$ depending only on $T$; determinism guarantees that the output is a \langfam{uOBDD}{<}.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langref{CNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{CNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langref{cSDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{cSDD}}.

Because counting the models of a \langref{d-DNNF} is in P and counting the models of a \langref{DNF} is \#P-complete, \langref{DNF} cannot be polynomially compiled into \langref{d-DNNF} unconditionally. Such a compilation implies P = \#P, collapsing the polynomial hierarchy \citep{Darwiche_2002}.
matrix.assumption: the polynomial hierarchy does not collapse

matrix.description: \citet[Corollary 7.6]{Amarilli_2018} gives a lower bound of $2^{\Omega(tw(\phi))}$ on the smallest \langref{d-SDNNF} computing any monotone \langref{DNF} of constant arity and degree. In particular, \langref{DNF} families whose treewidth grows linearly with their size force exponential-size \langref{d-SDNNF} representations.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}.
As defined by \citet{Darwiche_2002}, \langref{DNF} is a subset of \langref{DNNF}. Therefore, a polynomial compilation is trivial.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langref{FBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}.
It is well-known that some \langref{DNF} formulas (i.e. the parity function $PARITY_n=\bigoplus_{i=1}^n x_i$) have exponentially many prime implicates. \citep{Darwiche_2002}

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{IP}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langref{MODS} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{MODS}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{NNF}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langfam{OBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langref{PI} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{PI}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langref{SDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{SDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langfam{SDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}.

ocompilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langref{uFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.
matrix.assumption: the polynomial hierarchy does not collapse

matrix.description:
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langref{uOBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.

\citet[Chapter 4]{Wegener_2000} showed that the $ISA_n$ function has only exponential \langref{OBDD} size for every variable ordering $<$; from its definition, the function has a polynomial-size \langref{DNF} representation.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langfam{TDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{TDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langref{TDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{TDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langref{dec-DNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{dec-DNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langref{dec-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langfam{cSDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}.

Fix any variable order $<$. Each term of a \langref{DNF} can be represented as an \langfam{OBDD}{<} of linear size (a chain of decision nodes for each literal in the term). Their nondeterministic disjunction yields an \langfam{nOBDD}{<} of size $O(|\phi|)$ because every branch follows the same fixed order. \citep{Amarilli_2018,Wegener_2000}

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNF} compiled to \langfam{uOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{CNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{CNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{cSDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{cSDD}}.

\citet[Proposition 7]{Bova_2016} shows that the Sauerhoff function $S_n$ has \langref{DNNF} size $O(n^2)$. Theorem 9 shows that $S_n$ has \langref{d-DNNF} size $2^{\Omega(n)}$. (Also see \citet{Bova_2014}.)

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{d-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{DNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{DNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{FBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{IP} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{IP}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{MODS}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{MODS} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{MODS}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{MODS}}.

noPolyDescription.description:
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{nFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.

quasiDescription.description: \citet[Section 5]{Beame_2015} extends the compilation of \langref{dec-DNNF}s into \langref{FBDD}s (shown in \citet{Beame_2013}) to show that \langref{DNNF} can be quasipolynomial-time compiled into  langref{nFBDD}.

matrix.description:
First, we show no polynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{nFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.

Now, we show a quasipolynomial compilation exists.
\citet[Section 5]{Beame_2015} extends the compilation of \langref{dec-DNNF}s into \langref{FBDD}s (shown in \citet{Beame_2013}) to show that \langref{DNNF} can be quasipolynomial-time compiled into  langref{nFBDD}.
As defined by \citet{Darwiche_2002}, \langref{DNNF} is a subset of \langref{NNF}, so a polynomial compilation is trivial.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{nOBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langfam{OBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{PI} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{PI}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{SDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{SDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langfam{SDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langfam{SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{uFBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{uOBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{OBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langfam{TDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{TDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{TDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{TDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{dec-DNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{dec-DNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{dec-DNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langref{dec-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langfam{cSDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langfam{nOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{DNNF} compiled to \langfam{uOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langref{CNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{CNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langref{cSDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}.
As defined by \citet{Darwiche_2002}, \langref{FBDD} is a subset of \langref{d-DNNF}, so a polynomial compilation is trivial.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langref{d-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langref{DNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{DNF}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{DNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langref{IP} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{IP}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langref{MODS} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{MODS}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{NNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langref{nOBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langfam{OBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langref{PI} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{PI}}.

\citet{Beame_2015} relates the size of \langref{SDD} representations to best-partition communication complexity and derive simple examples for which \langref{FBDD} representations are exponentially more concise than \langref{SDD} representations.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langfam{SDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}.
\citet[Appendix D.2]{Pipatsrisawat_2010} and \citet[Section 6.3]{Capelli_2016} independently proved this result using different techniques.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langfam{SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}.
As defined by \citet{Amarilli_2018}, \langref{FBDD} is the subset of \langref{uFBDD} with no $\vee$-nodes.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langref{uOBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.
The hidden weighted bit function $HWB_n$ has \langref{OBDD} size $2^{\Omega(n)}$ \citep{Bryant_1986} but \langref{FBDD} size $O(n^2)$ \citep{Gergov_1994}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langfam{TDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{TDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langref{TDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{TDD}}.

Rewrite each decision node labeled $x$ as $(x \wedge D_0) \vee (\neg x \wedge D_1)$, where $D_0$ and $D_1$ are the rewritings of the 0- and 1-successors. The introduced $\vee$-gates are decision gates and the $\wedge$-gates are decomposable, so all $\vee$-gates arise from decision node rewrites, yielding a \langref{dec-DNNF} in linear time \citep{Amarilli_2018}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langref{dec-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langfam{cSDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langfam{nOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{FBDD} compiled to \langfam{uOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.

Consider the \langref{DNF} formula $\Pi_n= igvee_{i=0}^{n-1}(x_{2i} \wedge x_{2i+1})$. This formula is in prime implicants form and each clause in $\Pi_n$ is an essential prime implicant of it. Hence its negation $
eg\Pi_n$ lies in \langref{IP}.

Since the early work of Quine, we know that the number of essential prime implicates of a formula is a lower bound on the number of clauses that can be found in any \langref{CNF} representation of it. However, since $\Pi_n$ has $2^n$ prime implicants, $
eg\Pi_n$ has $2^n$ prime implicates, so any \langref{CNF} representation of $
eg\Pi_n$ must have at least $2^n$ clauses. \citep{Darwiche_2002}

ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langref{cSDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{cSDD}}.
matrix.assumption: the polynomial hierarchy does not collapse

matrix.description: \supportspoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\CT}, but \nosupportspoly{\langref{IP}}{\CT}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langref{d-DNNF} with polynomial blowup, then \langref{IP} would support \CT in polynomial time, a contradiction. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}.
matrix.assumption: the polynomial hierarchy does not collapse

matrix.description:
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langref{d-SDNNF} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}.
matrix.assumption: the polynomial hierarchy does not collapse

matrix.description:
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}.

matrix.description: As defined by \citet{Darwiche_2002}, \langref{IP} is a subset of \langref{DNF}. Therefore, a polynomial compilation is trivial.
\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNNF}}.

The negation of the clique detection function $\neg\Sigma_{n,k}$ has $O(n^3)$ prime implicants (hence polynomial \langref{IP} size), but any \langref{FBDD} for $\neg\Sigma_{n,k}$ has exponential size for suitable $k$ \citep{Darwiche_2002,Wegener_1987}.
The $OR_n$ function $\bigvee_{i=1}^nx_i$ can be represented in $O(n)$ as a \langref{IP} formula but has $2^n-1$ models. \citep{Darwiche_2002}

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{NNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langfam{OBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langref{PI} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{PI}}.

ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langref{SDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{SDD}}.
matrix.assumption: the polynomial hierarchy does not collapse

ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}.

matrix.description: \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}.

ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langref{uFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langref{uOBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.
