ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langref{OBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{OBDD}}.

ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langfam{TDD}{T} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}.
matrix.assumption: the polynomial hierarchy does not collapse

matrix.description:
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{TDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langref{TDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{TDD}}.
matrix.assumption: the polynomial hierarchy does not collapse

matrix.description:
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langref{dec-DNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{dec-DNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langref{dec-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}.

ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langref{cSDD}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langfam{cSDD}{T} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{cSDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}.
matrix.assumption: the polynomial hierarchy does not collapse

matrix.description: \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.

ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{IP} compiled to \langfam{uOBDD}{<} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.
matrix.assumption: the polynomial hierarchy does not collapse

matrix.description: A Shannon tree for any \langref{MODS} formula can be generated in polynomial time. Paths from the root to 0-leaves yield a \langref{CNF} representation \citep{Darwiche_2002}.

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{cSDD}}.
As defined by \citet{Darwiche_2002}, \langref{MODS} is a subset of \langref{d-DNNF}. Therefore, a polynomial compilation is trivial.

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}.

As defined by \citet{Darwiche_2002}, \langref{MODS} is a subset of \langref{DNF} (any \langref{MODS} formula can be written as a disjunction of the individual models). Therefore, a polynomial compilation is trivial.
\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{DNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{FBDD}}.
The Quine-McCluskey algorithm generates an \langref{IP} formula in polynomial time. \citep{Wegener_1987}

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{CNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{NNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

A Shannon tree for any \langref{MODS} formula following order $<$ can be generated in polynomial time. This tree can be reduced into a corresponding \langfam{OBDD}{<} in polynomial time \citep{Darwiche_2002}.

\citet{Kaleyski_2016} constructs a family of Boolean functions $\psi_i$ with \langref{MODS} size $\Theta(2^{2i})$ but \langref{PI} size $\Omega(2^{(i-1)^2/4})$, ruling out a polynomial compilation. Whether an exponential separation exists remains open.

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{SDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{OBDD}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{TDD}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{TDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{dec-DNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{dec-DNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{CNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{CNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{cSDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}.
The Sauerhoff function has an \langref{nFBDD} of size $O(n^2)$ over $n^2$ variables, but as a \langref{d-DNNF} has size $2^{\Omega(n)}$. \citep{Amarilli_2018}

ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{d-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{DNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{DNF}}.

Rewrite each decision node labeled $x$ as $(x \wedge D_0) \vee (\neg x \wedge D_1)$, where $D_0, D_1$ are the rewritings of the 0- and 1-successors. The $\wedge$-gates are decomposable, yielding a \langref{DNNF} in linear time \citep{Amarilli_2018}.

Consider the Boolean functions $\psi_n,\phi_n:\{0,1\}^{n^2}\to\{0,1\}$ that respectively test whether, in an $n \times n$ Boolean matrix, either the number of 1's is odd and there is a full row of 1's, or the number of 1's is even and there is a column full of 1's. An \langref{FBDD} of size $O(n^2)$ may simulate either $\psi_n$ or $\phi_n$, and thus the \langref{uFBDD} $\psi_n\vee\phi_n$ is of size $O(n^2)$; however, an \langref{FBDD} for $\psi_n\vee\phi_n$ is provably of size $2^{\Omega(n^{1/2})}$ \citep{Amarilli_2018}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{IP} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{IP}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{MODS} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{MODS}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{NNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{nOBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langfam{OBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{PI} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{PI}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{SDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langfam{SDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langfam{SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}.
The Sauerhoff function has an \langref{nFBDD} of size $O(n^2)$ over $n^2$ variables, but as a \langref{d-DNNF}, which generalize \langref{uFBDD}, has size $2^{\Omega(n)}$. \citep{Amarilli_2018}

ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{uOBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{OBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langfam{TDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{TDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{TDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{TDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{dec-DNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{dec-DNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{dec-DNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langref{dec-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langfam{cSDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langfam{nOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{FBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. If \langref{nFBDD} compiled to \langfam{uOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{NNF} compiled to \langref{CNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{NNF}}{\langref{CNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{NNF} compiled to \langref{cSDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{NNF}}{\langref{cSDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{NNF} compiled to \langref{d-DNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{NNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{NNF} compiled to \langref{d-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{NNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{NNF} compiled to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{NNF}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. If \langref{NNF} compiled to \langref{DNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{CNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore

ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{NNF} compiled to \langfam{cSDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict

matrix.assumption: the polynomial hierarchy does not collapse

matrix.description:
\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{nOBDD} compiled to \langref{d-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{nOBDD} compiled to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langref{nOBDD} compiled to \langref{DNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{DNF}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{DNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{nOBDD} compiled to \langref{FBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. If \langref{nOBDD} compiled to \langref{IP} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{IP}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{IP}}. If \langref{nOBDD} compiled to \langref{MODS} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{MODS}}.
As defined by \citet{Amarilli_2018}, \langref{nOBDD} is the subset of \langref{nFBDD} satisfying an order of the variables, so compilation entails discarding the order.
\compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nFBDD}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{NNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{nOBDD} compiled to \langfam{OBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{nOBDD} compiled to \langref{PI} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{PI}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{nOBDD} compiled to \langref{SDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{nOBDD} compiled to \langfam{SDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}.

Construct a right-linear vtree from the variable order, then rewrite each decision node labeled $x$ as $(x \wedge D_0) \vee (\neg x \wedge D_1)$, where $D_0, D_1$ are the rewritings of the 0- and 1-successors. The vtree alignment ensures every $\wedge$-gate respects the variable partition, yielding an \langref{SDNNF} in linear time \citep{Amarilli_2018}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{nOBDD} compiled to \langfam{SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{nOBDD} compiled to \langref{uFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{nOBDD} compiled to \langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict

The Pairwise \langref{CNF} formula $\Sigma_n = \bigwedge_{i=0}^{n-1}(x_{2i} \vee x_{2i+1})$ has $2^n$ prime implicates; its negation $\neg\Sigma_n$ lies in \langref{PI} and therefore has $2^n$ essential prime implicants, forcing any \langref{DNF} representation to have at least $2^n$ terms \citep{Darwiche_2002}.

ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{PI}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{SDD} compiled to \langfam{SDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDD}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{SDD} compiled to \langfam{SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{SDD} compiled to \langref{OBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{SDD} compiled to \langfam{TDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDD}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{SDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{SDD} compiled to \langref{dec-DNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{dec-DNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{SDD} compiled to \langref{dec-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{SDD} compiled to \langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDD}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{SDD} compiled to \langfam{cSDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDD}}{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{SDD} compiled to \langfam{nOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDD}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{SDD} compiled to \langfam{uOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDD}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langfam{SDD}{T} compiled to \langref{CNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{CNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}.
\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}.
For any fixed vtree $T$, \langfam{SDD}{T} is a strict subset of \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}, so compilation is trivial. \citep{VanDenBroeck_2015}

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langfam{SDD}{T} compiled to \langref{DNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{DNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{DNNF}}.

By \citet[Corollary 3]{Bollig_2018}, the weighted sum function $WS_n$ can be represented by \langfam{SDD}{T}{s} of size $O(n^3)$ respecting the vtrees used in the construction, but has exponential \langref{FBDD} size. Hence \langfam{SDD}{T} does not compile to \langref{FBDD} in quasipolynomial size.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langfam{SDD}{T} compiled to \langref{IP} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{IP}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. If \langfam{SDD}{T} compiled to \langref{MODS} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{MODS}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-DNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{NNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. If \langfam{SDD}{T} compiled to \langfam{OBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langfam{SDD}{T} compiled to \langref{PI} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{PI}}.

\langref{SDD} is the union of the fixed-vtree languages \langfam{SDD}{T}. Hence any \langfam{SDD}{T} formula is already an \langref{SDD} formula, so the compilation is trivial and polynomial-time. \citep{Darwiche_2011}

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{SDNNF}}.
\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{uFBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langfam{SDD}{T} compiled to \langref{OBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{OBDD}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langfam{SDD}{T} compiled to \langref{dec-DNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{dec-DNNF}}.

ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langfam{SDD}{T} compiled to \langref{dec-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilesquasi{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. If \langfam{SDD}{T} compiled to \langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}.

\citet[Theorem 1]{VanDenBroeck_2015} gives a class of Boolean functions $f_m$ and corresponding vtrees $T_m$ such that $f_m$ has an \langfam{SDD}{T_m} representation of size $O(m^2)$, yet the canonical \langfam{SDD}{T_m} representation of $f_m$ has size $\Omega(2^m)$. This separates uncompressed from compressed \langref{SDD}{s} when the vtree is held fixed. However, ruling out polynomial-size \langfam{cSDD}{T'} representations of these functions for every target vtree $T'$ remains open.

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilesquasi{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.
\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilesquasi{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{CNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{CNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{cSDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{cSDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{d-DNNF} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}.
matrix.assumption: the polynomial hierarchy does not collapse

matrix.description:
\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{d-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{DNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{DNF}}.

As defined by \citet{Amarilli_2018}, a structured \langref{DNNF} is a triple of the corresponding \langref{DNNF}, the vtree $T$, and a mapping $\rho$; as such, extracting a \langref{DNNF} from a \langref{SDNNF} is trivial.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{FBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{IP} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{IP}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{IP}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{MODS} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{MODS}}.

noPolyDescription.description:
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{nFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.

matrix.description:
First, we show no polynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{nFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.

Now, we show a quasipolynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \compilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{nFBDD}}.
\compilespoly{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{NNF}}.

noPolyDescription.description:
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{nOBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

quasiDescription.description: \citet[Theorem 2]{Bollig_2018} shows that \langref{SDNNF} can be compiled into \langref{nOBDD} by adapting the compilation of \citet{Beame_2015} from \langref{DNNF} to \langref{nFBDD}.

matrix.description:
First, we show no polynomial compilation exists.
\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{nOBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict \nocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore \nocompilespoly{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{nOBDD}}.

Now, we show a quasipolynomial compilation exists.
\citet[Theorem 2]{Bollig_2018} shows that \langref{SDNNF} can be compiled into \langref{nOBDD} by adapting the compilation of \citet{Beame_2015} from \langref{DNNF} to \langref{nFBDD}.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{OBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{PI}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{PI} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{PI}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{SDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{SDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{SDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langfam{SDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uFBDD}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{uFBDD} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{nFBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{uFBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{uOBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{uOBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{OBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{TDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{TDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{TDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{TDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-DNNF}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{dec-DNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{dec-DNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langref{dec-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{dec-SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. \compilesquasi{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{OBDD}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{OBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langfam{dec-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}{\langref{cSDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{cSDD}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langfam{cSDD}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{OBDD}}{\langref{uOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{uOBDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{d-SDNNF}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{nOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{OBDD}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langref{nOBDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{nOBDD}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langref{SDNNF} compiled to \langfam{uOBDD}{<} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langfam{uOBDD}{<}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{IP}}{\langref{DNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. If \langfam{SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{CNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{IP}}{\langref{CNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{CNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{cSDD}}{\langref{SDD}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDD}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langfam{SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{cSDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{cSDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. If \langfam{SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{d-DNNF} with polynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilespoly{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-DNNF}}.
matrix.assumption: the polynomial hierarchy does not collapse

matrix.description:
\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langfam{SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{d-SDNNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. If \langfam{SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langfam{d-SDNNF}{T} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{d-SDNNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langfam{TDD}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{TDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. If \langfam{SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{DNF} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{OBDD}{<}}{\langref{DNF}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{DNF}}.
\compilespoly{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{SDNNF}}. \compilespoly{\langref{SDNNF}}{\langref{DNNF}}. Therefore \compilespoly{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{DNNF}}.

\compilespoly{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{d-SDNNF}{T}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. If \langfam{SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{FBDD} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDD}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{FBDD}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. If \langfam{SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{IP} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{IP}}.

\compilespoly{\langref{DNF}}{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}. \compilespoly{\langfam{nOBDD}{<}}{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}. 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. \compilespoly{\langref{MODS}}{\langref{IP}}. If \langfam{SDNNF}{T} compiled to \langref{MODS} with quasipolynomial blowup, this would contradict 
ocompilesquasi{\langref{DNF}}{\langref{IP}}. Therefore 
ocompilesquasi{\langfam{SDNNF}{T}}{\langref{MODS}}.
